case_title: GREG LUBISCH II VS. PETER J BUSCH et al

docket_entries.description: CASE ASSIGNED TO JUDGE RICHARD KRAMER FOR ALL PURPOSES. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET ON JUL-09-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 303. (THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-09-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 303). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUBISCH II, GREG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUBISCH II, GREG AS TO DEFENDANT BUSCH, PETER J HAINES, CHARLES YAGGY, CAROL MAHONEY, PATRICK MORGAN, MARY KAPLAN, SUSAN MCBRIDE, JAMES J KHAN, HAROLD E SULLIVAN, DONALD J WOOLARD, CHARLOTTE WALTER MILLER, MARY J GARANGO, WILLIAM LEE, CYNTHIA MING-MEI SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-09-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-07-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-16-2014

NOT REPORTED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-09-2014, AT 10:30 AM, IS CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2014, AT 1:30 PM, IN DEPT. 303, ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 303.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. A FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET BY THE COURT AT A LATER TIME IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT SUBMIT A WRITTEN REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (303).
